title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Netafim India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Netafim India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India Global Group:
Netafim India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India Global Group!
